methods.name: key_vault_interface.key_vault_interface.KeyVaultInterface.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the Key Vault Interface and loads secrets.

Args:
    key_vault_name (str): The Azure Key Vault name.
    tenant_id (str): Azure AD Tenant ID.
    client_id (str): Azure Client ID.
    secrets_to_load (dict, optional): Secrets to load into the interface.

methods.name: key_vault_interface.key_vault_interface.KeyVaultInterface.get
documentation:
Retrieve a secret value from loaded secrets.

Args:

: secret_name (str): Name of the secret.

Returns:

: str: Value of the secret or None if not found.

```
raises ValueError

If the secret_name is not a string.
```

methods.name: key_vault_interface.key_vault_interface.KeyVaultInterface.__get_secret_from_kv
documentation:
Retrieves a secret value from Azure Key Vault.

Args:

: secret_name (str): Name of the secret in Key Vault.

Returns:

: str or None: Secret value, or None if expired or unavailable.

```
raises Exception

If unable to retrieve the secret from Azure Key Vault.
```

methods.name: key_vault_interface.key_vault_interface.KeyVaultInterface.load_secrets
documentation:
Loads all secrets specified in 'secrets_to_load' into memory.

Iterates over the secrets_to_load dictionary and fetches each secret from the Azure Key Vault.

methods.name: key_vault_interface.key_vault_interface.KeyVaultInterface._load_secret
documentation:
Loads a single secret into memory.

Args:

: alias (str): Alias for the secret.
  secret_name (str): Actual name of the secret in Key Vault.

```
raises Exception

If loading the secret fails.
```

methods.name: key_vault_interface.key_vault_interface.KeyVaultInterface.forget_secret
documentation:
Removes a secret from memory.

Args:

: alias (str): Alias of the secret to remove.

```
raises KeyError

If the secret alias is not found in the loaded secrets.
```

methods.name: key_vault_interface.key_vault_interface.KeyVaultInterface.update_and_reload_secrets
documentation:
Updates the list of secrets to load and reloads them.

Args:

: new_secrets (dict): Dictionary of new secrets to load.

```
raises TypeError

If new_secrets is not a dictionary.
```

This class serves as an interface for interacting with Azure Key Vault.

Implements a singleton pattern to ensure only one instance is created.
It handles the interaction with Azure Key Vault to retrieve secrets and manage them in memory.

```
param key_vault_name

The Azure Key Vault name.

param tenant_id

Azure AD Tenant ID.

param client_id

Azure Client ID.

param secrets_to_load

Optional dictionary of secrets to load into the interface.

type secrets_to_load

dict, optional
```
